name: workItems.postComment
description: Post a comment on a work item. Comments can be from users or agents and optionally link to execution runs.

work_item_id.description: ID or display ID (e.g. 'myproject-42') of the work item to comment on (required)

body.description: Comment text content (required). Supports markdown formatting.

author_id.description: ID of the comment author - user ID or agent ID (required)

author_type.description: Type of author: 'user' for human users, 'agent' for AI agents

run_id.description: Optional link to an execution run ID. Useful for agent-posted summaries.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata to attach to the comment

user_id.description: User ID performing the action (for audit logging)

actor_role.description: Role of the actor (for audit logging)

actor_surface.description: Surface the action is performed from (e.g., 'mcp', 'web', 'cli')

success.description: Whether the comment was posted successfully

error.description: Error message if success is false

input.body: Started working on this task. Will update when done.
